## 2.2.2.A. PI #1

### What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?

2025 KEP achievement is quite similar to 2024 whih had improved with regards to previous years (better planning, less transition plans, less industrial actions and lower delays, better KEA results). See 2.2.1.A KPI #1 for major changes implemented by the DSNA. Measures that improve KEA generally also improve KEP.
